experience.description: Founded a sole proprietorship to fully commit to freelancing, handling everything from finances and client management to delivery of multiple concurrent client projects.
highlights: Built and shipped client SaaS products end-to-end
Managed full project lifecycle: scoping, delivery, billing
Maintained long-term client relationships originating from Upwork

experience.description: Worked as a mid-level front-end engineer at a 200-300 employee financial technology company alongside dozens of front-end engineers. Navigated the high compliance bar of fintech and a rigorous QA process at enterprise scale.
highlights: Built scalable front-end features for enterprise fintech
Operated within strict financial compliance requirements
Leveled up through an intense QA and review process

experience.description: Built a freelance reputation starting from small jobs and grew it into a primary source of clients. Most long-term clients today originated through Upwork.
highlights: Grew profile from $5 jobs to long-term client engagements
Delivered web applications across multiple industries

experience.description: First full-time engineering role, landed without a formal degree by demonstrating capability through the technical interview.
highlights: Hired without a degree based on demonstrated skill
Shipped production features as part of a small engineering team

experience.description: Started freelancing on Fiverr building automation tools, including a sneaker raffle bot that became my first paying gig as a developer.
highlights: Built sneaker raffle automation tools for clients
Bootstrapped a career in software without prior professional experience
